features.label: Expanded Ad URL Pattern Detection
features.desc: Added 15+ new ad URL parameters to the block list — adsid, adslot, correlator, pucrd, rdid, vad_type, label=preroll/midroll/postroll and more. Covers newer YouTube ad delivery signals that were previously slipping through.

features.label: Smart /api/stats/atr Blocking
features.desc: Previously the entire /api/stats/atr endpoint was blocked, which could trigger detection. Now only ad-specific requests (el=adunit, is_ad=1) are blocked — regular video stats (el=detailpage) are allowed through.

features.label: Anti-Fingerprint DOM Injection
features.desc: Replaced window.__vxObs global (detectable by YouTube) with a randomized non-enumerable document property. MutationObserver now targets #movie_player only instead of document.documentElement — far less suspicious. Added setInterval fallback for ads that slip through the observer.

features.label: Blocklist Engine Whitelist
features.desc: Added a permanent whitelist to the blocklist engine — fonts.googleapis.com, YouTube infrastructure, imasdk.googleapis.com and other essential domains are never blocked even if they appear in EasyList or EasyPrivacy.

features.label: Fixed /youtubei/v1/log_event Detection Trigger
features.desc: log_event was being blocked, causing YouTube to detect adblock since this endpoint is used for all events (video play, navigation, autoplay) — not just ads. Now correctly allowed through.

features.label: Fixed PiP Button TrustedHTML Error on YouTube
features.desc: PiP button was using innerHTML to create the button element, which YouTube's Trusted Types policy blocks. Rebuilt using createElement and createElementNS — no more console errors.

features.label: Fixed PiP MutationObserver Crash
features.desc: webviewPreload.js was crashing with 'parameter 1 is not of type Node' because document.documentElement was null in some webview contexts. Now retries with a 50ms delay until the target node is available.
